subject: A massive serpentine leviathan rising from churning ocean waves, its long sinuous body coiling out of the white-capped sea with frilled fins and an elongated head emerging from a burst of spray
description: A colossal blue-grey sea serpent erupts from a violent ocean, its long ribbon-like body breaking the surface in multiple arcs amid towering waves and explosive spray. The creature's head, capped with crest-like fins, lunges forward from a wall of foam. The entire composition is dominated by cool blue-white tones with the leviathan rendered almost monochromatic against the storm-tossed water. The horizon is low and the sky pale, putting all visual weight on the creature and the violent sea.
foreground: leviathan body breaching from foaming waves
background: stormy open ocean with low pale horizon
emotion: ferocious, predatory lunge — the creature is mid-strike
